HomePage.description: Looking for a starting point or more instructions? Head over to Templates or the Learning center.

Hero.title: Discover the space you deserve, where your new lifestyle begins
Hero.description: Start your journey towards the right property through diverse options and a simple, clear search experience—and discover your journey with confidence.

AboutHero.eyebrow: A Story of Trust and Vision
AboutHero.title:
A successful investment starts with a clear vision
And is completed with sustainable value

OurStory.title: Our Story
OurStory.description: Wahd Company launched with an ambitious investment vision to develop qualitative real estate projects, and today it represents an integrated entity that leads the establishment of investment projects and the construction of residential complexes according to the highest standards of quality and sustainability to create a solid real estate value that lasts for generations.

OurVision.visionDescription: To be pioneers in the construction and real estate development sector by providing innovative and sustainable projects that contribute to improving the work and living environment, and to build a distinguished reputation based on quality, integrity, and commitment to our clients and society.
OurVision.missionDescription: We at Wahd Company strive to transform urban projects into integrated experiences that combine creativity, quality, and sustainability. We are committed to delivering projects that meet the highest standards and create lasting value for our clients and the community.

OurValues.title: Our Values
OurValues.qualityDescription: Commitment to the highest standards of quality and accuracy in every project.
OurValues.innovationDescription: Innovative design solutions that combine creativity and efficiency.
OurValues.sustainabilityDescription: Balanced sustainable solutions that combine environment and development.

ContactHero.title: Get in touch and let us shape the features of your next investment with confidence and sustainability.

About.description: Waad Real Estate Investment Company seeks to provide high-quality investment opportunities built on quality and smart planning, ensuring sustainable value and long-term trust. We develop real estate projects with professional standards that meet our clients' aspirations and keep pace with market growth.

AboutSection.title: Wahed Urban
AboutSection.description: We use our expertise in managing and developing multi-category real estate to deliver reliable, rewarding returns through smart, secure, and sustainable property investments.

ProjectsSection.subtitle: Crystallization of Creativity
ProjectsSection.title: Our Projects
ProjectsSection.description: Our projects are a crystallization of creativity and luxury, combining modern design and quality execution to deliver exceptional and sustainable value, meeting future aspirations and always reinforcing our customers' trust.
ProjectsSection.projectOneDescription: An engineering concept inspired by authenticity, with spacious homes designed for privacy, integrated services, and practical solutions that elevate daily living quality.
ProjectsSection.projectTwoDescription: An integrated villa community that reflects urban excellence in a secure modern environment, with carefully crafted architecture supporting comfort, sustainability, and investment value.

PartnersSection.subtitle: Communication Gateway
PartnersSection.title: Leadership Alliance
PartnersSection.description: Leadership alliances are an extension of our ambitious vision. They bring together strategic expertise and reliable partnerships to deliver sustainable value and qualitative projects. They strengthen our position and always support the trust of our partners and customers.

CtaSection.subtitle: Communication Gateway
CtaSection.title: Start the Conversation
CtaSection.description: We believe that communication is the beginning of building trust. We are happy to answer your inquiries and provide the necessary support to be your partners in achieving your aspirations and providing an experience that always meets your expectations.

ContactSection.title: Let’s start the conversation
ContactSection.description: Whether you have questions or are ready to begin your next project, our team is here to provide you with professional guidance and support at every stage.

ProjectsHero.title: We develop integrated projects with a professional vision that are implemented with high quality and sustainable value

ProjectsIntro.description:
Wahed projects are not only construction spaces, but integrated <heart></heart> 
 experiences that combine <highlight>quality and sustainability</highlight> with a modern lifestyle.

ProjectsCard.title: Al Rahmaniyah Residential Complex
ProjectsCard.description: An engineering design that combines authenticity and modernity in spacious residential spaces. Privacy and integrated amenities create a contemporary lifestyle, with practical solutions that deliver comfort and clear quality of life.
